zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Swaffer於大約1706年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州切斯特時，他的父親William Thomas Swaffer47歲，母親Mary Elizabeth Caldwell43歲。他與Catherine Roach Johnson結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1778年9月17日在美國北卡羅來納州克雷文劍橋大學默里 波享年73歲，埋葬在美國北卡羅來納州盧瑟福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Swaffer于大约1706年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加宾夕法尼亚州切斯特时，他的父亲William Thomas Swaffer47岁，母亲Mary Elizabeth Caldwell43岁。他与Catherine Roach Johnson结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1778年9月17日在美国北卡罗来纳州克雷文劍橋大學默里 波享年73岁，埋葬在美国北卡罗来纳州盧瑟福。

nameMeanings.name: Swaffer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Swatfield Bridge in Willesborough (Kent). The placename derives from Old English swæth ‘track, pathway’ + ford ‘ford’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Swaffer was born about 1706, in Chester, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, his father, William Thomas Swaffer, was 47 and his mother, Mary Elizabeth Caldwell, was 43. He married Catherine Roach Johnson. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 17 September 1778, in New Bern, Craven, North Carolina, United States, at the age of 73, and was buried in Rutherford, North Carolina, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Swaffer est né environ 1706, à Chester, Pennsylvanie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, William Thomas Swaffer, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Mary Elizabeth Caldwell, avait 43 ans. Il a épousé Catherine Roach Johnson. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 17 septembre 1778, à New Bern, Craven, Caroline du Nord, États-Unis, à l’âge de 73 ans, et a été enterré à Rutherford, Caroline du Nord, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Swaffer um 1706 in Chester, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Thomas Swaffer 47 und seine Mutter Mary Elizabeth Caldwell 43. Er hat Catherine Roach Johnson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 17. September 1778 im Alter von 73 Jahren in New Bern, Craven, North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Rutherford, North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Swaffer è nato il circa 1706 nel Chester, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, il suo padre, William Thomas Swaffer, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Mary Elizabeth Caldwell, aveva 43 anni. Lui sposato Catherine Roach Johnson. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 17 settembre 1778, nel New Bern, Craven, Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 73 anni, e fu sepolto a Rutherford, Carolina del Nord, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Swafferが約1706年にイギリス植民地アメリカペンシルベニア州チェスターで生まれた時，父William Thomas Swafferは47歳，母Mary Elizabeth Caldwellは43歳であった。Catherine Roach Johnsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1778年9月17日にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州クラベンニュー バーンで73歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州ルスエルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Swaffer(이)가 대략 1706년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 펜실베이니아 주 체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Thomas Swaffer(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Elizabeth Caldwell(은)는 43세였다. 그는 Catherine Roach Johnson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1778년 9월 17일 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 크레이븐 뉴 버에서 73세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 루더퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Swaffer nasceu aproximadamente 1706, em Chester, Pennsylvania, British Colonial America, seu pai, William Thomas Swaffer, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Mary Elizabeth Caldwell, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine Roach Johnson. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 17 de setembro de 1778, em New Bern, Craven, Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América, com 73 anos, e foi sepultado em Rutherford, Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Swaffer родился около 1706 г. в местности честир, Пенсильвания, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени William Thomas Swaffer было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Elizabeth Caldwell, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine Roach Johnson. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 17 сентября 1778 г. в местности ню бирн, кравен, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 73 лет и был похоронен в местности рутирфорд, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Swaffer nació aproximadamente 1706, en Chester, Pensilvania, British Colonial America, su papá, William Thomas Swaffer, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Mary Elizabeth Caldwell, tenía 43 años. Se casó con Catherine Roach Johnson. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 17 de septiembre de 1778, en New Bern, Craven, Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 73 años, y fue sepultado en Rutherford, Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos.
